zh.Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾可藍費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Wheeler於1399年出生在英國貝德福爾可藍費爾德時，他的父親John Thomas Wheeler24歲，母親Elizabeth Mary Phillips22歲。他於1415年與Mary Elizabeth Booth在英國貝德福爾可藍費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他在英國肯特被列為sheriff of kent。他去世於1435年在英國貝德福爾享年36歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾可藍費爾德。

zh-hans.Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾可藍費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Wheeler于1399年出生在英国貝德福爾可藍費爾德时，他的父亲John Thomas Wheeler24岁，母亲Elizabeth Mary Phillips22岁。他于1415年与Mary Elizabeth Booth在英国貝德福爾可藍費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他在英国肯特被列为sheriff of kent。他去世于1435年在英国貝德福爾享年36岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾可藍費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wheeler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a wheelwright, a maker of wheels (primarily for carts and other vehicles, but also other kinds of wheels, for use in spinning or other manufacturing processes), from Middle English wheler, whegheler, a derivative of Old English hweogol, hweowol, hwēol ‘wheel’.
History: A founder of Salisbury, NH, in 1634 was John Wheeler.

variants.name: Rower
meanings: English: occupational name from Anglo-Norman French roer ‘wheelwright’ (Old French roier, rouwier, rouer, an agent derivative of roue ‘wheel’). Compare Wheeler .
English: occupational name from Middle English rouer(e) ‘rower, oarsman’. Compare Rother .

variants.name: Wheelwright
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English whelewright(e), whelrihte ‘wheelwright, maker of wheels and wheeled vehicles’ (Old English hwēol + wyrhta). See also Wheeler .

History: John Wheelwright (c. 1592–1679), clergyman, came to Boston, MA, from Lincolnshire, England in 1636. He was banished from Massachusettes for his support of his sister-in-law, Anne Hutchinson, in the antinomian controversy; he set up a community at Exeter, NH.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Wheeler was born in 1399, in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England, his father, John Thomas Wheeler, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Mary Phillips, was 22. He married Mary Elizabeth Booth in 1415, in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. His occupation is listed as sheriff of kent in Kent, England. He died in 1435, in Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Wheeler est né en 1399, à Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Thomas Wheeler, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mary Phillips, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mary Elizabeth Booth en 1415, à Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of kent à Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1435, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Wheeler 1399 in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thomas Wheeler 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mary Phillips 22. Er hat 1415 in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England Mary Elizabeth Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of kent in Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Wheeler è nato il nel 1399 nel Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Thomas Wheeler, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mary Phillips, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mary Elizabeth Booth nel 1415, nel Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of kent nel Kent, England. Morì nel 1435, nel Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールド
ja.Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Wheelerが1399年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールドで生まれた時，父John Thomas Wheelerは24歳，母Elizabeth Mary Phillipsは22歳であった。1415年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールドでMary Elizabeth Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。イギリスケントでの職業はsheriff of kentと記録されている。彼は1435年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで36歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wheeler(이)가 1399년 영국 베드퍼드실르 크랜필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Wheeler(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mary Phillips(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1415년 영국 베드퍼드실르 크랜필드에서 Mary Elizabeth Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 켄트에서 sheriff of kent이었다. 그는 1435년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 크랜필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Wheeler nasceu em 1399, em Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Thomas Wheeler, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mary Phillips, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Elizabeth Booth em 1415, em Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of kent em Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1435, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Wheeler родился в 1399 г. в местности кранфиелд, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Thomas Wheeler было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mary Phillips, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Elizabeth Booth в 1415 г. в местности кранфиелд, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of kent в местности кэнт, Англия. Он умер в 1435 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности кранфиелд, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Wheeler nació en 1399, en Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Thomas Wheeler, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mary Phillips, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mary Elizabeth Booth en 1415, en Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of kent en Kent, Inglaterra. Murió en 1435, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
